caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political analysis related to Nigeria. The title "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu" suggests that the discussion revolves around Bola Tinubu's role or potential impact on Nigeria. On the left side of the screen, there is an image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is presumably providing commentary over the phone. The right side shows a man wearing a red cap and glasses, likely Bola Tinubu, with other individuals in the background. The setting seems to be a formal event or gathering. The video aims to provide insights into the political landscape and the significance of Bola Tinubu's statement.
